Docs

✨ Features

Overview

# ✨ Features

### 🔧 [Code Interpreter API](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/features/code_interpreter) [Permalink for this section](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/features\#-code-interpreter-api)

- **Secure, Sandboxed Execution**: Run code in Python, Node.js (JS/TS), Go, C/C++, Java, PHP, Rust, and Fortran without local setup.
- **Seamless File Handling**: Upload and process files directly, download outputs, and manage file sessions effortlessly.
- **No Privacy Concerns**: The Code Interpreter is fully isolated, ensuring secure and private execution of your code.
- **[Learn More →](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/features/code_interpreter)**

### 🤝 [Agents](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/features/agents) [Permalink for this section](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/features\#-agents)

- **No-Code Custom Assistants**: Build specialized, AI-driven helpers that work with any supported model—no coding required.
- **Flexible & Extensible**: Attach tools like DALL-E-3, semantic search, and calculators, or integrate file management and code execution seamlessly.
- **Paradigm Shift for LibreChat**: Agents define a new era of customizable workflows and context-aware interactions, enabling you to shape LibreChat into the tool you need.
- **[Learn More →](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/features/agents)**

### 🪄 **[Artifacts](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/features/artifacts)** [Permalink for this section](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/features\#-artifacts)

- **Generative UI:** React, HTML, Mermaid diagrams
- Use any model you have setup, and iterate on created outputs

### 🎨 **[Image Generation & Editing](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/features/image_gen)** [Permalink for this section](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/features\#-image-generation--editing)

- **Multiple Providers**: Generate images with:
  - [**GPT-Image-1**](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/features/image_gen#1--openai-image-tools-recommended)
  - [**DALL-E**](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/features/image_gen#2--dalle-legacy)
  - [**Stable Diffusion**](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/features/image_gen#3--stable-diffusion-local)
  - [**Flux**](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/features/image_gen#4--flux)
  - [**MCP Servers**](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/features/image_gen#5--model-context-protocol-mcp)
- **Image Creation**: Create high-quality, original images from detailed text descriptions
- **Image Editing**: Modify existing images based on text instructions and image references with GPT-Image-1.

### 🖥️ **Intuitive UI** [Permalink for this section](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/features\#%EF%B8%8F-intuitive-ui)

- **Seamless User Experience**: Our platform mirrors the intuitive interface of ChatGPT, ensuring that users feel comfortable and familiar while navigating.
- **Dark Mode**: Reduce eye strain with our elegant dark mode, perfect for prolonged usage.
- **Streaming Capabilities**: Enjoy real-time streaming of AI responses for an interactive experience.
- **Latest Updates**: Stay ahead with the most recent features and improvements released regularly.

### 🤖 **AI Model Selection** [Permalink for this section](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/features\#-ai-model-selection)

#### **Diverse Model Options** [Permalink for this section](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/features\#diverse-model-options)

- **[AWS Bedrock](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/configuration/pre_configured_ai/bedrock)**: Access a variety of models through Amazon’s Bedrock service.
- **[Azure OpenAI](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/configuration/azure)**: Integrate with Microsoft’s Azure for powerful cloud-based services.
- **[Anthropic (Claude)](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/configuration/pre_configured_ai/anthropic)**: Experience cutting-edge AI technology from Anthropic.
- **[OpenAI](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/configuration/pre_configured_ai/openai)**: Utilize the robust and renowned GPT models from OpenAI for a wide range of applications.
- **[Google](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/configuration/pre_configured_ai/google)**: Use Google’s premier machine learning offerings.
- **[Plugins](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/configuration/tools)**: Extend functionalities with a variety of plugins.
- **[Assistants API](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/configuration/pre_configured_ai/assistants)**: Seamlessly connect with APIs, including Azure Assistants, for expanded functionalities.

### ✅ **Compatibility Across AI Services** [Permalink for this section](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/features\#-compatibility-across-ai-services)

#### **Remote & Local Integration** [Permalink for this section](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/features\#remote--local-integration)

- **Groq**: Fast, efficient AI inference with custom processors
- **Deepseek**: Cutting-edge Open-source AI models
- **Ollama**: Generative AI models for interactive applications and chatbots.
- **Cohere**: Natural language processing APIs for business applications.
- **Mistral AI**: Open-source high-performance generative AI.
- **Apple MLX**: Apple’s framework for machine learning and AI integration.
- **koboldcpp**: AI-assisted storytelling and content generation tools.
- **OpenRouter**: API gateway for routing AI model requests.
- **together.ai**: Collaborative platform for AI model development and deployment.
- **Perplexity**: AI-driven search engine for contextual answers.
- **ShuttleAI**: Automated machine learning platform for rapid deployment.
- **[Learn how to configure Custom endpoints like the ones above](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/quick_start/custom_endpoints)**

### 💾 **[Create, Save, & Share Custom Presets](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/user_guides/presets)** [Permalink for this section](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/features\#-create-save--share-custom-presets)

- **Personalization**: Save your favorite AI and configuration settings as presets.
- **Easy Sharing**: Share presets with colleagues or teams.

### 🔀 **Switch Between AI Endpoints and Presets, Mid-Chat** [Permalink for this section](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/features\#-switch-between-ai-endpoints-and-presets-mid-chat)

- **Dynamic Configuration**: Change AI models/providers and settings on-the-fly without disrupting the chat flow.

### 🔄 **Edit, Resubmit, and Continue Messages with Conversation Branching** [Permalink for this section](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/features\#-edit-resubmit-and-continue-messages-with-conversation-branching)

- **Message Flexibility**: Edit previous messages and resubmit for better responses.
- **Conversation Control**: Branch conversations to explore different discussion paths without losing context.

### 🌿 **[Fork Messages & Conversations](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/features/fork)** [Permalink for this section](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/features\#-fork-messages--conversations)

- **Advanced Context Management**: Split messages to create multiple conversation threads, enhancing control of your conversations’ context.

### 🥷 **[Temporary Chat](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/features/temporary_chat)** [Permalink for this section](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/features\#-temporary-chat)

- **Chat incognito in Librechat**: Use Temporary Chat for private conversations that won’t clutter your history, appear in search, or be bookmarked – perfect for sensitive topics or quick experiments.

### 💬 **Multimodal Chat** [Permalink for this section](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/features\#-multimodal-chat)

#### **Image Analysis** [Permalink for this section](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/features\#image-analysis)

- 📸 **Claude 3, GPT-4, Gemini Vision, Llava and Assistants**: Upload and analyze images seamlessly with these advanced models.

#### **[File Interaction](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/features/rag_api)** [Permalink for this section](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/features\#file-interaction)

- 🗃️ **Custom Endpoints, OpenAI, Azure, Anthropic, Google**: Chat with files using various powerful endpoints.

#### **OpenAI Assistants API** [Permalink for this section](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/features\#openai-assistants-api)

- **Capabilities**:
  - File handling
  - Code interpretation
  - Tool integration
  - API actions 🔦

### 🌎 **Multilingual UI** [Permalink for this section](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/features\#-multilingual-ui)

- **Broad Language Support**: Switch between multiple languages including:
  - **English**
  - **中文**
  - **Deutsch**
  - **Español**
  - **Français**
  - **Italiano**
  - **Polski**
  - **Português Brasileiro**
  - **Русский**
  - **日本語**
  - **Svenska**
  - **한국어**
  - **Tiếng Việt**
  - **繁體中文**
  - **العربية**
  - **Türkçe**
  - **Nederlands**
  - **עברית**
  - **and more…**

### 🎨 **Customizable Dropdown & Interface** [Permalink for this section](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/features\#-customizable-dropdown--interface)

- **User Adaptability**: Interface designed to cater both to power users and newcomers, ensuring a tailored user experience.

### 📧 **[Secure Email Verification](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/configuration/authentication/email)** [Permalink for this section](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/features\#-secure-email-verification)

- **Access Security**: Verify your email to secure your account and ensure dependable access.

### 🗣️ **[Hands-Free Chat](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/configuration/stt_tts)** [Permalink for this section](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/features\#%EF%B8%8F-hands-free-chat)

#### Speech-to-Text and Text-to-Speech [Permalink for this section](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/features\#speech-to-text-and-text-to-speech)

- **[Voice Interaction](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/configuration/stt_tts#stt)**: Utilize voice commands and responses to interact with the AI.
- **[Audio Support](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/configuration/stt_tts#tts)**: Automatically send and receive audio messages.
- **Vendor Support**:
  - **OpenAI**
  - **Azure OpenAI**
  - **Elevenlabs**
  - **Local AI**

### 📥 **[Conversation Import](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/features/import_convos)** [Permalink for this section](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/features\#-conversation-import)

- **Compatibility**: Import existing conversations from platforms like:
  - **LibreChat**
  - **[ChatGPT](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/features/import_convos#how-to-import-conversations-from-chat-gpt)**
  - **Chatbot UI**

### 📤 **Conversation Export** [Permalink for this section](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/features\#-conversation-export)

- **Multi-format Saving**: Export chats as:
  - **Screenshots**
  - **Markdown**
  - **Text**
  - **JSON**

### 🔍 **[Search Functionality](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/configuration/meilisearch)** [Permalink for this section](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/features\#-search-functionality)

- **Efficient Navigation**: Quickly find specific messages or entire conversations with advanced search features using **Meilisearch**.

### 👥 **[Multi-User Secure Authentication](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/configuration/authentication)** [Permalink for this section](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/features\#-multi-user-secure-authentication)

- **User Management**: Secure and manage multiple users with authentication controls and token spend tools.

### ⚙️ **Comprehensive Configuration Options** [Permalink for this section](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/features\#%EF%B8%8F-comprehensive-configuration-options)

#### 🚀 **Deployment Flexibility** [Permalink for this section](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/features\#-deployment-flexibility)

- **[Local Deployment](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/local)**: Run your AI services entirely offline.
- **[Cloud Deployment](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/remote)**: Utilize the cloud for broader access and scalability.
- **[Proxy & Reverse Proxy Configuration](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/remote/nginx)**: Optimize routing and security.
- **[Docker Support](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/local/docker)**: Quick and consistent deployment with Docker.
- **[Firebase CDN](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/configuration/cdn/firebase)**: Fast and reliable content delivery via Firebase CDN.
- **[Logging System](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/configuration/logging)**: Integrated logging to monitor system performance and activity.

### 🔒 **Authentication and Security** [Permalink for this section](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/features\#-authentication-and-security)

#### 🔑 **Flexible Authentication Options** [Permalink for this section](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/features\#-flexible-authentication-options)

- **[Token Usage](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/configuration/token_usage)**: Efficiently manage and allocate usage tokens.
- **[LDAP/AD Authentication](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/configuration/authentication/ldap)**: Secure integration with LDAP/Active Directory for enterprise-level authentication.
- **[OAuth2-OIDC Authentication](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/configuration/authentication/OAuth2-OIDC)**: Compatibility with OAuth2 and OIDC for modern authentication protocols.
- **[Email verification & Password Reset](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/configuration/authentication/email)**: Easy email verification and password reset functionality to ensure account security.

### 📖 **Open-Source Development** [Permalink for this section](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/features\#-open-source-development)

- **Transparency and Collaboration**: Enjoy the benefits of an open-source platform, built with public contributions.

### 🧑‍🤝‍🧑 **Community-Driven Development** [Permalink for this section](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/features\#-community-driven-development)

- **Support & Feedback**: Engage with a vibrant community for development support and continuous improvement based on user feedback.

### **Customization** [Permalink for this section](https://www.librechat.ai/docs/features\#customization)

- **A Lot of Customization Options**: Tailor the platform to your specific needs with extensive customization capabilities, ensuring a personalized user experience.
